title: Preferences
description: Per-vertical needs profile: the lean signals that drive a rule, plus a summary the advisor speaks from. Output of chat extraction, input to compare(). Household facts (carFinancing, homeOwnership, lineCount) live on the UserState, NOT here. Fields not tied to a rule the calculator can act on go in `context`, never in `signals`.

summary.description: one short SI sentence, no sumniki

context.description: advisor-only notes; the calculator never reads these

signals.description: Load-bearing preferences. telco: dataNeedGB, watchesSport, paidTvPacksUsed[], wantsFixedBroadband, openToSwitchOperator, travelsOutsideEU, budgetPriority. energy: annualKwh, meterType(single_ET|dual_VT_MT), hasGas, annualGasKwh, dayNightSplit(mostly_day|even|mostly_night), priceCertaintyPref(cheapest_now|price_locked), contractLockTolerance(no_lock|ok_12mo), eInvoiceOk. insurance: healthPrefs{valuesFasterPrivateAccess, expectsDentalWork}, floodExposed, travelFrequency(rare|occasional|frequent), coverElsewhere{personalAccident, roadsideAssist}. Insurance's legacy-dopolnilno drop is DERIVED from a line of kind legacy_dopolnilno, not a signal.
